## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this needed?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only

## Testing

- [ ] `pio run` succeeds locally
- [ ] `pio run -t upload` tested on device
- [ ] `pio run -t uploadfs` tested if web/filesystem files changed
- [ ] WiFi/AP behavior verified if networking code changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is `feat/*`, `fix/*`, `hotfix/*`, or `chore/*`
- [ ] PR targets `main`
- [ ] No direct commits to `main`
- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented

## Notes

- Hardware tested:
- Risks/known limitations:
